title: Awards and Appreciations
description: Earned the Star of the Month award for exceptional coding contributions, improving user acquisition by 25%. Honored with Tech4HOPE Appreciation for impactful skill-based volunteering toward society.

title: Featured at Times Square, New York
description: Featured by Topmate.io at Times Square, New York, among 1000 mentors empowering individuals to achieve growth.

title: Problem Solving Excellence
description: Solved 1,350+ DSA problems across LeetCode, HackerRank & more, earning the LeetCode Guardian badge with a contest rating of 2100+ (global top 1.2%).
